summary: Iteration 15 — Count Clairvoyant (keypad 7) full flow verified end-to-end, plus Cyndi typed-name fix confirmed. Backend pytest 4/4 PASS on POST /api/programs/count: category=Love number=1988 -> persona_name='Count Clairvoyant', voice='echo', sum=26, root=8, text (LLM), sign_off starts 'Your thoughts are hidden once more'. Empty number defaults to '7' (sum=7 root=7). Missing body 200. /api/personas roster places 'count' at index 6 (slot 7). Frontend: lift -> dial 1 -> oracle list shows '7 Count Clairvoyant' -> dial 7 opens count_menu ('1 A Number Reading', '2 Mathemagic'). Sub-1 opens count_category with all 9 categories (Love/Money/Career/Family/Friendship/Lucky Numbers/Important Dates/Difficult Decisions/General). Choosing 1=Love opens count_number with data-testid=count-number-input; pressing keypad 1,9,8,8 builds '1988' in the input; # submits and LLM returns a gothic numerology reading (~10s) with the Count sign-off. # from result returns to oracle list. Mathemagic (sub-2) opens count_magic with data-testid=count-magic-input and instructions; typing '1089' + Send reveals success ('Behold! My sealed prophecy read... one thousand and eighty-nine'). Wrong answer '1234' produces in-character 'recount, mortal' response without crashing. Cyndi typed-name FIX confirmed: typing 'Testy' into cyndi-name-input and pressing Send now advances to 'Alright Testy, tell us what's going on — ask us one clear thing.' (previously mic-only).

test_results.count_menu_flow: PASS — dial 1 -> 7 -> count_menu -> 1 -> categories shown -> 1 (Love) -> count_number input present
test_results.count_keypad_entry: PASS — keypad 1,9,8,8 builds '1988' in count-number-input, # submits, LLM reading + sign-off returned
test_results.count_result_hash_regression: PASS — # from result returns to CHOOSE ANOTHER ORACLE
test_results.mathemagic_correct: PASS — 1089 reveals 'Behold! My sealed prophecy read... one thousand and eighty-nine.'
test_results.mathemagic_wrong: PASS — 1234 produces 'recount, mortal' in-character response, no crash
test_results.cyndi_typed_name_fix: PASS — typing 'Testy' + Send captured (advances to question prompt)

critical_code_review_comments: PhoneSimulator.jsx continues to grow (per-persona sub-modes: count_menu/count_category/count_number/count_magic add ~5 more branches to onKey). Extracting oracle sub-flows into a per-oracle module/reducer is now overdue.

revealMathemagic uses local Count Clairvoyant lines but bypasses the LLM entirely (deterministic) — good for reliability but ensure it stays consistent with the Count's voice/sign-off pattern used elsewhere.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all requested Count + Mathemagic + Cyndi-typed-name behaviors verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Count Clairvoyant on slot 7. After dial 1 wait >=3000ms + poll for 'CHOOSE YOUR ORACLE', then wait ~1500ms before pressing 7. count_menu shows sub-1 (A Number Reading) & sub-2 (Mathemagic). count_number/count_magic are INPUT_MODES: shared textbox rendered (data-testid=count-number-input / count-magic-input), and keypad digits also append to the same input via mindlineInputRef. # submits via global handler; Send (mindline-send-btn) also submits via submitCurrent which now reads mindlineInputRef (this fixed the Cyndi/Ruby typed-Send bug too, verified via Cyndi flow returning 'Alright Testy, tell us what's going on' after typed name send). Mathemagic reveal is DETERMINISTIC (no LLM) — compares stripped input to '1089'. Number Reading uses ONE LLM call (~10-40s).
